parameters.name: markSeen
parameters.label: Mark email message(s) as read when fetched

parts.text: Write a newsletter based on this brief: {{1.snippet}}

You are a professional newsletter writer. Your ONLY job is to convert the brief below into a newsletter.

OUTPUT FORMAT (follow exactly):
SUBJECT: [one compelling subject line]
PREVIEW: [40-word preview text]
BODY: [newsletter body, 200-300 words, professional tone]
CTA: [one clear call to action]

RULES:
- No casual language
- No claims without evidence
- No competitor mentions
- If brief is unclear, write TODO: [what is missing]

spec.help: You can use public or signed URLs as input by using the URLs.

parts.text:
You are a brand compliance reviewer. Review the newsletter draft below.

CHECK FOR:
1. Tone — is it professional? Flag if casual or offensive
2. Legal — any unverified claims or guarantees?
3. Brand — any competitor names or off-brand phrases?
4. Spam triggers — words that get flagged by email filters

OUTPUT FORMAT (follow exactly):
STATUS: APPROVED or FLAGGED
ISSUES: [list each issue, or "None"]
SUGGESTION: [one-line fix for each issue, or "None"]
